column1: ADDENDUM E. FINAL CY 2026 GEOGRAPHIC PRACTICE COST INDICES (GPCIs) BY STATE AND MEDICARE LOCALITY

column4: SAN FRANCISCO-OAKLAND-BERKELEY (SAN FRANCISCO/SAN MATEO/ALAMEDA/CONTRA COSTA CNTY)

column1: *Work GPCI reflects a 1.5 floor in Alaska established by the MIPPA.
**PE GPCI reflects a 1.0 floor for frontier states established by the ACA.
***Note: The work GPCI floor of 1.0 that was applied in previous updates was extended through January 1, 2027 by Section 6208 of Continuing Appropriations Act, 2026 (H.R.7148).
Therefore, the work GPCIs for 2026 reflect the 1.0 work GPCI floor.
Note: For CY 2024 and on, Addendum E will reflect the retirement of 3 California localities, as finalized in the CY 2023 PFS final rule.
